languages.text: "Лукха рассказал, что вы сделали для Йовахи. Вы не представляете, насколько сержант-инструктор важен для 32-го полка. Спасибо".
"Lukha told me what you did for Jovakha. You cannot imagine how important a drill sergeant is to the 32nd Regiment. Thank you."
languages.original_text: "Лукха рассказал, что вы сделали для Йовахи. Вы не представляете, насколько сержант-инструктор важен для 32-го полка. Спасибо".

traits.locale_text: "Lukha told me what you did for Jovakha. You cannot imagine how important a instructir sergeant is to the 32nd Regiment. Thank you."
"Lukha told me what you did for Jovakha. You cannot imagine how important a instructir sergeant is to the 32nd Regiment. Thank you."
"Lukha told me what you did for Jovakha. You cannot imagine how important a drill sergeant is to the 32nd Regiment. Thank you."
"Lukha told me what you did for Jovakha. You cannot imagine how important a drill sergeant is to the 32nd Regiment. Thank you."
"Lukha told me what you did for Jovakha. You cannot imagine how important a drill sergeant is to the 32nd Regiment. Thank you."

languages.text: “卢卡跟我说了您为约瓦哈做的事。您无法想象操练军士对第32团有多重要。谢谢您。”
languages.original_text: "Lukha told me what you did for Jovakha. You cannot imagine how important a drill sergeant is to the 32nd Regiment. Thank you."

traits.locale_text: “卢卡跟我说了您为约瓦哈做的事。您无法想象操练军士对第32团有多重要。谢谢您。”

languages.text: "Lukha, Jovakha için yaptıklarınızı anlattı. Bir talim çavuşunun 32. Alay için ne kadar önemli olduğunu tahmin edemezsiniz. Teşekkür ederim."
languages.original_text: "Lukha told me what you did for Jovakha. You cannot imagine how important a drill sergeant is to the 32nd Regiment. Thank you."

traits.locale_text: "Lukha, Jovakha için yaptıklarınızı anlattı. Bir talim çavuşunun 32. Alay için ne kadar önemli olduğunu tahmin edemezsiniz. Teşekkür ederim."

languages.text: « Lukha m'a appris ce que vous avez fait pour Jovakha. Vous n'imaginez pas à quel point un sergent-instructeur est important pour le 32e régiment. Je vous remercie. »
languages.original_text: "Lukha told me what you did for Jovakha. You cannot imagine how important a drill sergeant is to the 32nd Regiment. Thank you."

traits.locale_text: « Lukha m'a appris ce que vous avez fait pour Jovakha. Vous n'imaginez pas à quel point un sergent-instructeur est important pour le 32e régiment. Je vous remercie. »

languages.text: «Lukha me ha dicho lo que hizo por Jovakha. No se puede hacer a la idea de cuánto necesita el 32.º regimiento a sus sargentos de instrucción. Gracias».
languages.original_text: "Lukha told me what you did for Jovakha. You cannot imagine how important a drill sergeant is to the 32nd Regiment. Thank you."

traits.locale_text: «Lukha me ha dicho lo que hizo por Jovakha. No se puede hacer a la idea de cuánto necesita el 32.º regimiento a sus sargentos de instrucción. Gracias».

languages.text: "Lukha hat mir erzählt, was Ihr für Jovakha getan habt. Ihr könnt Euch nicht vorstellen, wie wichtig ein Drill Sergeant für das 32. Regiment ist. Danke."
languages.original_text: "Lukha told me what you did for Jovakha. You cannot imagine how important a drill sergeant is to the 32nd Regiment. Thank you."

traits.locale_text: "Lukha hat mir erzählt, was Ihr für Jovakha getan habt. Ihr könnt Euch nicht vorstellen, wie wichtig ein Drill Sergeant für das 32. Regiment ist. Danke."

languages.text: 「ルカがジョヴァハのために君がしたことを話してくれた。32連隊にとって、訓練指導官はいかに重要か、君は想像できないだろう。ありがとう。」
languages.original_text: "Lukha told me what you did for Jovakha. You cannot imagine how important a drill sergeant is to the 32nd Regiment. Thank you."

traits.locale_text: 「ルカがジョヴァハのために君がしたことを話してくれた。32連隊にとって、訓練指導官はいかに重要か、君は想像できないだろう。ありがとう。」
